phrases.en: And put it in the envelope with the pictures.
phrases.zh: 然后把它和照片一起放进信封。

phrases.en: I write my friend's address in the middle of the envelope and my return address at the upper left.
phrases.zh: 我把朋友的地址写在信封中间，把我的回信地址写在左上角。

phrases.en: I don't know how much postage I need.
phrases.zh: 我不知道需要贴多少邮资。

phrases.en: So, I take the letter to the post office.
When it's my turn, I go to the window.
I hope she likes the pictures.
phrases.zh: 我希望她喜欢这些照片。
